name: Daniel Lee
bio: Daniel Lee is a small business owner and a longtime resident of Hoffman Estates who has been raising a family in Cook County for over 25 years. He serves on the Hoffman Estates Economic Development Commission and Planning & Zoning Commission. Lee is one of two Republicans competing in the March 17, 2026 Republican primary for District 15 (along with Gabriella Hoxie). He runs as a conservative emphasizing family values, law enforcement support, and fiscal responsibility under the banner 'Make Cook County Great Again.' His campaign website is citizens4daniellee.com.

jacket.note: No separate Illinois Sunshine committee found for Lee as of research date. Total District 15 race funds = $133,326.91 (all three candidates).

policy_platform.position: Back law enforcement and public safety

career_history.role: Member, Hoffman Estates Economic Development Commission
Member, Hoffman Estates Planning & Zoning Commission

data_note: Republican primary candidate for District 15. Contested GOP primary vs. Gabriella Hoxie.
